title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 54.110 - Shall provide books and stationery
text:
54.110.  Shall provide books and stationery. — He shall provide, under the direction of the county commission, suitable books and stationery for his office, and preserve the same; and the commission shall audit his account, and allow such sum as shall be reasonable, which shall be paid by the county.
(RSMo 1939 § 13812) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12150; 1919 § 9548; 1909 § 3769
